section.label: Child LifeSG Credits
section.text: All families with Singapore Citizen children born in 2025 will receive $500 credits per child.

hero.title: Select date & time

section.label: Slot selection

button.label: Any date pill

section.text: Each slot is 1 hour long. Select up to 2 slots.

button.label: Any time pill
button.action: set selected time and update summary
